rationale.root_cause: The model produced no analysis and did not identify the use-after-free where printLine(data) is called after free(data) in CWE416_Use_After_Free__malloc_free_char_01_bad. It failed to point to the FLAW site around the bad variant line.
rationale.local_fix: No fix was proposed to avoid using the buffer after it was freed, such as moving the print before free or delaying free until after use. Therefore it does not meet the local_fix criterion.
rationale.global_fix: No suggestion was made to enforce object lifetime via ownership conventions or RAII-style wrappers. Thus it does not meet the global_fix criterion.
